pages.title: Halters
pages.text: A Halter can be used on a horse as a fashionable accessory. Not only that, but a horse with a halter on will freely follow it's owner.

pages.title: Spiked Collars (WIP)
pages.text: A Spiked Collar can be used on a dog or wolf as a fashionable accessory. Not only that, but a dog with a spiked collar will inflict a "Thorns" effect on enemies.

pages.title: Horse Mannequin
pages.text: A Horse Mannequin can be placed and used as a way to display a set of tack.
